metadata.description: Root refactor for durable actor control signals, mailbox priority scheduling, cooperative interrupt, typed waits, and recovery invariants.

task.name: Write durable control signal model tests
task.description: Use TDD to specify event identity, causation, correlation, priority, mailbox kind, op id, idempotency key, and unblock classification.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Failing tests define durable control signal normalization and idempotency behavior.
Tests distinguish interrupt, wake, and ordinary mailbox classes.

task.name: Implement durable control signal data contract
task.description: Add typed data structures and reducers for durable control signals without replacing execution paths yet.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Control signal model tests pass.
Contract and logic layering remains consistent with project package boundaries.

task.name: Write suspended fiber invariant tests
task.description: Specify invalid and repairable states, especially suspended external fibers with empty mailboxes and no cooperative exec state.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests fail for silent acceptance of unrecoverable suspended external state.
Tests cover safe repair when durable control signals exist.

phase.name: Mailbox Enqueue Scheduling And Cooperative Interrupt

task.name: Write enqueue scheduling tests
task.description: Specify behavior for suspended fiber wake, running actor ordinary enqueue, and running actor wake-message enqueue without actor re-entry.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests assert actor handler is not re-entered while running.
Tests assert suspended matching wait becomes ready or pending resume.

task.name: Implement unified enqueue and resume boundary
task.description: Introduce the shared control API that persists a signal, enqueues mailbox data, and schedules matching suspended fibers.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Unblock-capable messages can be emitted through one shared API.
Repeated signal emission or redelivery does not double-consume completion.

task.name: Write and implement cancel interrupt tests
task.description: Cover cancel during LLM, tool, compression, and non-abortable work; assert control mailbox priority and late completion handling.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Abortable in-flight work receives abort on cancel.
Late completions after cancel do not revive cancelled fibers.
Cancel is consumed ahead of ordinary mailbox messages.

phase.name: Typed Waits And Execution Path Migration

task.name: Write typed wait reason tests
task.description: Specify wait reasons for LLM, tool, compression, questionnaire parsing, child done, human input, and idle external waits.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Internal async waits no longer persist only generic external waiting.
Each typed wait has a matching unblock predicate.

task.name: Migrate cooperative async completions
task.description: Replace split `actor.send` plus `resumeFiber` patterns for LLM, tool, compression, and questionnaire completion with durable control signal emission.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Targeted completion paths no longer rely on separate manual resume calls for correctness.
Existing cooperative executor tests remain passing.

task.name: Add compatibility fallback for legacy snapshots
task.description: Keep transcript-tail repair as a conservative fallback for old sessions while preferring durable control signals.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Legacy sessions without control signals recover conservatively when safe.
New sessions recover from durable control signals first.

phase.name: Persistence Recovery And Data Plane Observability

task.name: Write recovery crash-point tests
task.description: Simulate crash after durable event before resume, after mailbox before projection, after projection before snapshot, and after cancel before late completion.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Crash-point fixtures reproduce previous stuck class before implementation.
Recovered runtime continues without manual transcript editing.

task.name: Implement durable control recovery
task.description: Persist and recover control events, rebuild mailbox or exec state, and mark matching fibers ready during recovery.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Unconsumed durable signals are redelivered or reduced during recovery.
Consumed signals are not applied twice.

task.name: Expose control stream and scheduler signals
task.description: Add Rx data-plane observability for control event stream and scheduler readiness signals without mixing semantic event streams.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Control facts appear as ordered stream records.
Current scheduler readiness appears as signal/projection.

task.name: 同步项目知识文档
task.description: 根据 feature.json 中配置的 knowledgeSync targets 和对应 attractor，判断并同步受影响的知识目录。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 已读取目标 knowledge attractor
已判断是否需要同步 docs 或外部知识目录
已记录未同步的理由或已完成同步

task.name: Migrate remaining actor-surface and holon wake paths
task.description: Replace remaining direct mailbox enqueue plus naked resume paths for actor-surface input/cancel/questionnaire, heartbeat wake, and holon/coordination handoffs with durable control signal emission.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Actor-surface human input, cancel, and questionnaire response can be emitted through a durable signal boundary.
Holon/member routing and idle shutdown wake paths use durable control signal emission instead of split enqueue/resume.
Heartbeat wake delivery can be emitted through a durable signal boundary without a separate resume step.
Focused tests cover the migrated actor-surface durable signal boundary.
